name: Right On Brands, Inc.
business: The Company creates and markets a line of CBD consumer products through its wholly-owned subsidiaries. The product line includes ENDO Drops, ENDO Ease Topical, ENDO Tokes, and ENDO Gummies. The company sells directly to consumers online, through its retail store, and to branded stores.

exposures.sentence: The Company creates and markets a line of CBD consumer products.
